run_command: $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 003.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive; $env:PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE='1'; $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m negflow process "data\fff\图像 002.fff" --output output --preset neutral_archive
main_issues: The OpenCV strip-frame probe now produces 12 candidates for 图像 003.fff instead of 13.
图像 002.fff remains stable at 12 OpenCV strip-frame candidates.
Final export still uses the old projection detector, so 图像 003.fff final PNG output remains 17 until promotion.
Git is now initialized and has a baseline commit: 94c15fb Initial NegFlow pipeline.
next_step: Replace the default preview detector boxes with OpenCV strip-frame boxes when the OpenCV probe returns plausible results; keep the current projection detector as fallback.
